description_long: This rifle features a modern, tactical design with a matte black finish and a compact, angular frame. It is equipped with a skeletonized stock for reduced weight and improved maneuverability, and a prominent suppressor attached to the end of the barrel. The rifle has a pistol grip and an integrated trigger guard, with a detachable magazine housed in front of the grip. On top, there is a mounted red dot or holographic sight for rapid target acquisition. The overall build suggests a lightweight, polymer and metal construction suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, matte black tactical rifle with a skeletonized stock, suppressor, and mounted red dot sight.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the skeletonized stock, suppressor, pistol grip, and mounted sight.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the suppressor and the narrow profile of the barrel and sight.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the skeletonized stock, suppressor, and sight, with the magazine and grip visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock and the alignment of the sight and barrel.
